heading: Suspension of Philippine Trade Act of 1946
label: 1373 Suspension of Philippine Trade Act of 1946
text: The Philippine Trade Act of 1946 [ et seq.] (except [] relating to termination of payments into Philippine Treasury, and except amendments and repeals made by such Act) shall not apply during such time as the revised agreement is in effect.22 U.S.C. 1251section 506(a) of this title22 U.S.C. 1356
notes: References in TextThe Philippine Trade Act of 1946, referred to in text, is , , which is classified principally to subchapters I to IV of this chapter. Subchapters I, II, and III of this chapter were omitted from the Code. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.act Apr. 30, 1946, ch. 24460 Stat. 141section 1354 of this titleThe revised agreement, referred to in text, was set out as a note under .section 1371 of this title

Effective Date, , provided that:Act Aug. 1, 1955, ch. 438, title III, § 301(b)69 Stat. 426“The provisions of this title [enacting sections 1373 to 1379 of this title and amending , Territories and Insular Possessions] shall take effect on , but only if the President of the United States has made the proclamation referred to in subsection (a) [].”section 734 of Title 48section 1379 of this titleJanuary 1, 1956

Short Title, , provided that:Act Aug. 1, 1955, ch. 438, title I, § 169 Stat. 413“This Act [enacting this subchapter and amending , Territories and Insular Possessions] may be cited as the ‘Philippine Trade Agreement Revision Act of 1955’.”section 734 of Title 48
